title: Flux Networks [Fabric]
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/LdH52hG.png](https://i.imgur.com/LdH52hG.png)
Flux Networks By SonarSonic
_________________________
This is a Fabric port. Looking for a Forge version? [Click here](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flux-networks)
_________________________
[![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric_API-%23%236A6A6A?style=for-the-badge&logoColor=%23595959&label=Requires&color=%23B1AA99)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Description: Flux Networks gives you the ability to build Wireless Energy Networks. It allows you to customize these networks and manage the energy flow across your world. Removing the need to have cables going everywhere, hence decreasing lag and saving you time. Energy can also be transferred across dimensions, making energy management simple.
### Key Features
- Wireless cross-dimensional transfer
- Automatic energy conversion
- Unlimited transfer rates
- Support for TeamReborn energy
- Cross-dimensional inventory charging 
- Encrypt your networks with password protection
- Organize the priorities of your network

### Additional Features
- Name and color your networks
- Name each connection for easier identification
- Configure the players allowed to access your network
- Graphs to monitor recent energy spikes/drops 
- Wireless edit settings for all your connections
- Chunk loading abilities provided by each connection 
- Super Admin: delete inactive networks, switch ownership, etc

#### Version 4.0.7 + Above
Flux Networks has been rewritten by BloCamLimb. This new version is more server-friendly and no longer requires SonarCore. The majority of the original’s features remain. Some may not have been re-implemented or have been slightly altered. However, many new features have been added too!

**Modpacks**: Feel free to use this mod in any modpack you wish.

**Issues**: Please report all issues on the [GitHub](https://github.com/shurik204/flux-networks-fabric).
______________________
Got any questions/suggestions? Come join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/zdPcN64MKH)!
